title: Controlify ROG Ally Prompts
description: Replaces the Controlify Xbox One buttons with the ROG Ally ones
body:
Note that icons are from a Terraria resource pack, if anyone wants to help me create ones that look like Minecraft I'd happily do it

This pack won't get updates unless it needs to, 1.20.1 will work on all versions aslong nothing changed

Known working versions will be added to the supported list (launchers ignore this so check the page im not putting it in the name it's gonna get too long that way)
